allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "\\d character_classes" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "\\d character_species" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "\\d rooms" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "UPDATE alembic_version SET version_num = 'k2l3m4n5o6p7';" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "SELECT version_num FROM alembic_version; SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='character_classes' ORDER BY ordinal_position; SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='character_species';" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "SELECT conname, confrelid::regclass FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid='characters'::regclass AND contype='f';" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "\\d character_classes")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "\\d character_species")

Bash(DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:admin@localhost:5432/dnd_db python3 -c "
from app.character_options.infrastructure.seed import seed_character_options
from app.db.session import SessionLocal
db = SessionLocal\(\)
seed_character_options\(db\)
db.close\(\)
print\('done'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM character_classes; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM character_species;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "TRUNCATE TABLE character_classes, character_species CASCADE;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=admin psql -U postgres -h localhost -d dnd_db -c "\\d characters" 2>&1)
